---
title: "Example"
author: "Harvard Chan Bioinformatics Core"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:
   html_document:
      code_folding: hide
      df_print: paged
      highlight: pygments
      number_sections: true
      self_contained: true
      theme: cosmo
      toc: true
      toc_depth: 3
      toc_float:
         collapsed: true
         smooth_scroll: true
params:
  project_file: ../information.R
---

```{r, cache = FALSE, message = FALSE, warning=FALSE}
# This set up the working directory to this file so all files can be found
library(rstudioapi)
setwd(fs::path_dir(getSourceEditorContext()$path))
# NOTE: This code will check version, this is our recommendation, it may work
#.      other versions
stopifnot(R.version$major>= 4) # requires R4
if (compareVersion(R.version$minor,"3.1")<0) warning("We recommend >= R4.3.1") 
stopifnot(compareVersion(as.character(BiocManager::version()), "3.18")>=0)
```

This code is in this ![](https://img.shields.io/badge/status-stable-green) revision.

```{r source_params, cache = FALSE, message = FALSE, warning=FALSE}
source(params$project_file)
```

```{r rcore-css, echo=FALSE, results='asis'}
rcore::rcore_inject_css()
```

```{r setup, cache=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
# Load libraries
library(knitr)
library(rmarkdown)
library(DT)
library(ggplot2)
library(rcore)

# ---- Global ggplot2 theme & colour scales ----
theme_set(theme_rcore(base_size = 13))
scale_colour_discrete <- function(...) scale_color_cb_friendly(...)
scale_fill_discrete   <- function(...) scale_fill_cb_friendly(...)

# Set seed for reproducibility
set.seed(1454944673L)

# ---- Global knitr options ----
opts_chunk$set(
  cache      = FALSE,
  cache.lazy = FALSE,
  dev        = c("png", "pdf"),
  dpi        = 150,
  error      = TRUE,
  echo       = TRUE,
  fig.align  = "center",
  fig.height = 5,
  fig.retina = 2,
  fig.width  = 9.6,
  message    = FALSE,
  tidy       = FALSE,
  warning    = FALSE
)
```

# Overview

-   Project: `r project`
-   PI: `r PI`
-   Analyst: `r analyst`
-   Experiment: `r experiment`

# R session

List and version of tools used for the QC report generation.

```{r}
sessionInfo()
```
